languages.text: "Не печалься, эттфатер! Тебя ждет подвиг возвращения древнего писания прав, начертанного рукой самого Всеотца! Что за славная сага, что за громкая слава! А какой пир потом будет! Таков твой вюрд, {name}, и не помысли иного".

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ]"Не печалься, эттфатер! Тебя ждет подвиг возвращения древнего писания прав, написанного рукою самого Всеотца! Что за славная сага, что за громкая слава! А какой пир потом будет! Таков твой вюрд, {name}, и не помысли иного".

"Не печалься, эттфатер! Тебя ждет подвиг возвращения древнего писания прав, начертанного рукой самого Всеотца! Что за славная сага, что за громкая слава! А какой пир потом будет! Таков твой вюрд, {name}, и не помысли иного".
traits.speaker: UlfarCompanion

languages.text: "Do not grieve, Aett-Vater! A great deed awaits you: the recovery of the ancient scroll of rights, inscribed by the Allfather's own hand! What a glorious saga, what a thundering legend it will be! And the feast that will follow! That is your wyrd, {name} — do not dream of any other."
languages.original_text: "Не печалься, эттфатер! Тебя ждет подвиг возвращения древнего писания прав, начертанного рукой самого Всеотца! Что за славная сага, что за громкая слава! А какой пир потом будет! Таков твой вюрд, {name}, и не помысли иного".

traits.locale_text: "Do not grieve, aett-vater! A great deed awaits you: the recovery of the ancient writ of rights, inscribed by the Allfather's own hand! What a glorious saga, what a thundering legend it shall be! And the feast that will follow! That is your wyrd, {name}, do not dream of any other."

"Do not grieve, Aett-Vater! A great deed awaits you: the recovery of the ancient scroll of rights, inscribed by the Allfather's own hand! What a glorious saga, what a thundering legend it shall be! And the feast that will follow! That is your wyrd, {name}, do not dream of any other."

"Do not grieve, Aett-Vater! A great deed awaits you: the recovery of the ancient scroll of rights, inscribed by the Allfather's own hand! What a glorious saga, what a thundering legend it will be! And the feast that will follow! That is your wyrd, {name} — do not dream of any other."

languages.text: «¡No se lamente, Aett-Vater! Le espera una gran hazaña: recuperar el pergamino de sus derechos, ¡inscrito por el Padre de todas las cosas en persona! Será una saga gloriosa, ¡una leyenda atronadora! ¡Y el festín que vendrá después! Ese es su destino, {name}. No sueñe con otro».
languages.original_text: "Do not grieve, Aett-Vater! A great deed awaits you: the recovery of the ancient scroll of rights, inscribed by the Allfather's own hand! What a glorious saga, what a thundering legend it will be! And the feast that will follow! That is your wyrd, {name} — do not dream of any other."

traits.locale_text: «¡No se lamente, Aett-Vater! Le espera una gran hazaña: recuperar el pergamino de sus derechos, ¡inscrito por el Padre de todas las cosas en persona! Será una saga gloriosa, ¡una leyenda atronadora! ¡Y el festín que vendrá después! Ese es su destino, {name}. No sueñe con otro».

languages.text: “不要悲伤，狼领！一桩伟大的功业正等着你：去寻回那卷由全父亲手签署的古老权利文书！这将是一部何等辉煌的史诗，一桩何等震彻长空的传奇！还有那场庆功盛宴！这便是你的命运，{name}——再无其他。”
languages.original_text: "Do not grieve, Aett-Vater! A great deed awaits you: the recovery of the ancient scroll of rights, inscribed by the Allfather's own hand! What a glorious saga, what a thundering legend it will be! And the feast that will follow! That is your wyrd, {name} — do not dream of any other."

traits.locale_text: “不要悲伤，狼领！一桩伟大的功业正等着你：去寻回那卷由全父亲手签署的古老权利文书！这将是一部何等辉煌的史诗，一桩何等震彻长空的传奇！还有那场庆功盛宴！这便是你的命运，{name}——再无其他。”

languages.text: « Ne vous laissez pas abattre, aett-vater ! Une quête épique vous attend : la reconquête d'un ancien parchemin écrit de la main du Père de Tous ! Quelle saga glorieuse, quelle légende éclatante ce sera ! Et un fabuleux festin s'ensuivra ! C'est votre wyrd, {name}. Vous ne pourriez pas rêver mieux. »
languages.original_text: "Do not grieve, Aett-Vater! A great deed awaits you: the recovery of the ancient scroll of rights, inscribed by the Allfather's own hand! What a glorious saga, what a thundering legend it will be! And the feast that will follow! That is your wyrd, {name} — do not dream of any other."

traits.locale_text: « Ne vous laissez pas abattre, aett-vater ! Une quête épique vous attend : la reconquête d'un ancien parchemin écrit de la main du Père de Tous ! Quelle saga glorieuse, quelle légende éclatante ce sera ! Et un fabuleux festin s'ensuivra ! C'est votre wyrd, {name}. Vous ne pourriez pas rêver mieux. »

languages.text: "Kederlenme Aett-Vater! Seni büyük bir görev bekliyor: Yücebaba'nın kendi eliyle yazdığı kadim haklar parşömeninin kurtaracağız! Ne muhteşem bir destan, ne gümbürdeyen bir efsane olacak bu! Bir de ardından gelecek ziyafet! Senin kaderin bu. Başka bir şeyi düşünme bile."
languages.original_text: "Do not grieve, Aett-Vater! A great deed awaits you: the recovery of the ancient scroll of rights, inscribed by the Allfather's own hand! What a glorious saga, what a thundering legend it will be! And the feast that will follow! That is your wyrd, {name} — do not dream of any other."

traits.locale_text: "Kederlenme Aett-Vater! Seni büyük bir görev bekliyor: Yücebaba'nın kendi eliyle yazdığı kadim haklar parşömeninin kurtaracağız! Ne muhteşem bir destan, ne gümbürdeyen bir efsane olacak bu! Bir de ardından gelecek ziyafet! Senin kaderin bu. Başka bir şeyi düşünme bile."

languages.text: "Grämt Euch nicht, Aett-Vater! Eine große Tat erwartet Euch: Die Bergung der alten Rechtsbulle, verfasst vom Allvater selbst! Was für eine ruhmreiche Saga und was für eine Legende. Und erst das Festmahl, das folgen wird! Das ist Eure Bestimmung, {name}, träumt nicht von etwas anderem."
languages.original_text: "Do not grieve, Aett-Vater! A great deed awaits you: the recovery of the ancient scroll of rights, inscribed by the Allfather's own hand! What a glorious saga, what a thundering legend it will be! And the feast that will follow! That is your wyrd, {name} — do not dream of any other."

traits.locale_text: "Grämt Euch nicht, Aett-Vater! Eine große Tat erwartet Euch: Die Bergung der alten Rechtsbulle, verfasst vom Allvater selbst! Was für eine ruhmreiche Saga und was für eine Legende. Und erst das Festmahl, das folgen wird! Das ist Eure Bestimmung, {name}, träumt nicht von etwas anderem."

languages.text: 「悲しむことはない！オールファーザー自身の手によって刻まれた、古代の権利の巻物を取り戻すのだ！栄光の武勇伝、轟く伝説となろう！そして、それに続く宴！{name} 、それこそがおまえのワイアードなのだ。
languages.original_text: "Do not grieve, Aett-Vater! A great deed awaits you: the recovery of the ancient scroll of rights, inscribed by the Allfather's own hand! What a glorious saga, what a thundering legend it will be! And the feast that will follow! That is your wyrd, {name} — do not dream of any other."
